title: Consolidate the 4 duplicated translation dictionaries
objective: Replace getReportLabels, markdownText, and the duplicate getKnownErrorMessage with lookups against the Slice 012 namespaces, diff-reviewing wording before merging, and delete the unused reportSections array.

include: Diff all four existing dictionaries key by key before merging.
Replace duplicated lookups with calls into the shared namespaces.
Delete the unused reportSections dead-code array.
exclude: Any final rendered wording change beyond documented discrepancy resolution.
Extracting new hardcoded strings not already in one of the four dictionaries.
API error translation layer, formatting, switcher, pluralization, or test migration work.

done: getReportLabels, markdownText, and the duplicate getKnownErrorMessage are removed in favor of shared namespaces.
Existing content assertions still pass or discrepancies are documented in verification.
